---
title: "PAAR: AWE"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

MISSION <br> 
**A**URORAS & **W**ORM **E**RADICATION

**MISSION LOCATION** <br> 


**MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED** <br> 


**CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE** <br> 


**REMARKS** <br> 



**MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS** <br> 


https://m-gemmell.github.io/PRIMEVAL_DEITIES/Missions/M-AWE.html
